# Pocket CRM APK

Download the Pocket CRM APK, a local Android CRM that syncs contacts, SMS, and call logs into relationship timelines with scheduled SMS.

Download: https://tanzir71.github.io/android-apk-landing-pages/pocket-crm/assets/pocket-crm.apk
Canonical: https://tanzir71.github.io/android-apk-landing-pages/pocket-crm/
Author: Tanzir Rahman, https://tanziro.com
Package: com.pocketcrm.pocket_crm
Version: 1.0.0+1
APK size: 53.23 MB
SHA256: 3b1acbed3cb13e163840eddad03a15721ac871b7fb57acaa85c862f7093c15b3

Important: This APK is vibe-coded, has limited testing, and ships with no warranty. Users should read the permissions and install at their own risk.
